samples.xml_description:
Converts 8-bit data to 16-bit data. Clock signal. Active-low reset signal. Input signal indicating valid data. 8-bit input data. Output signal indicating valid data. 16-bit output data. Parameters:
type type="reg" id="data_lock" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit register to temporarily store the first valid data. type type="reg" id="flag">Flag signal to indicate the first valid data has been received. The data_out is implemented as a sequential logic block. It concatenates the contents of the data_lock register (8 bits) and the data_in register (8 bits) to form a 16-bit output when the input data is valid and the flag signal is active. The first valid data is temporarily stored in the data_lock register, and when the second valid data is input, they are concatenated to produce the output valid_out and data_out. The data_lock register is cleared when the reset signal is active, indicated by the condition !rst_n. The flag signal is set to 1 when the first valid data is received and is used to control the concatenation of the data inputs.
